title: About the Platform discussions category
excerpt:
Step up your platform skills. Check out common platform questions here and learn from other’s expertise & experience. 
From beginner to expertise, there is a discussion for you and we’d love to hear your voice, thoughts,…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Step up your platform skills. Check out common platform questions here and learn from other’s expertise & experience.

From beginner to expertise, there is a discussion for you and we’d love to hear your voice, thoughts, and ideas. This is the place for you to level up on your platform knowledge! We recommend looking in this section also to get inspired and learn from others about the platform.

In addition to our general product discussion category, here you can also find the following subcategories:

  • Special features & workflows - Share ideas on how to use advanced platform features and gain insights on how you can make your workflows even more efficient.
  • Apps and Integration - Uncover the world of monday apps, learn how to master integration and share your your app needs!
    *sales CRM - Learn more and ask questions about monday sales CRM.
  • monday dev- Find out more about monday dev capabilities

We recommend you first look around the categories and see what people are discussing. You may find answers to your questions and even more tips and tricks.

If you still do not find what you are looking for, feel free to open a new discussion and make sure to have a clear title and relevant tags.

Get ready for your “”aha” moment!
